source.notes: Manually collected social and defunct-social accounts/resources.

records.title: Anthony Bourdain @Bourdain
records.notes: Personal account; profile lists location “In transit” and links Facebook. ([X (formerly Twitter)][1])

records.title: Anthony Bourdain @anthonybourdain
records.notes: Personal account; search result shows 923 posts and bio: “Enthusiast. Frequent flyer. Used to cook for a living.” ([Instagram][2])

records.title: Anthony Bourdain
records.notes: Official Facebook page; page text says “accept no substitutes.” ([Facebook][3])

records.title: Anthony Bourdain
records.notes: Old official-ish blog; Tumblr pages link to Facebook/Twitter and describe it as “A continuous dribble…” ([Tumblr][4])

records.title: Anthony Bourdain on Tumblr
records.notes: Tumblr profile version of same account. ([Tumblr][5])

records.title: Parts Unknown publication
records.notes: Parts Unknown-era writing; includes Bourdain-authored pieces and links to Twitter/Facebook/Instagram/Tumblr. ([Medium][6])

records.title: Bourdain’s Li.st archive
records.notes: Partial archive of his defunct Li.st posts/lists; found via recent Reddit/HN discussion. ([Reddit][9])

records.title: Hunt for Bourdain’s Li.st content
records.notes: Useful context on recovering Li.st material. ([Reddit][10])
